Prediction
This combination shows break in education, and also clearly shows NO signs of
children.
Technical Aspect
The 11th lord Mars is in the 11th house, and from lagna the 11th lord is in the 10th
house.
Prediction
His brother was very close to him. In fact his brother’s words were instrumental in
quitting his home. And later the ashram was handed over to his brother’s family.
The reason behind SRK’s success! –
In the 80s he was an energetic ‘Fauji’ on the small screen. Early 90s he made his
presence felt on the silver screen through movies like Chamatkar, Raju Ban Gaya
Gentle Man, Dil Ashana Hai, Deewana and Maya Memsaab. And in mid 90s he was
already a Super Star!
This feat isn’t possible for all. Efforts clubbed with Raja Yoga in the Horoscope alone
takes a person to this level of name and fame, and SRK has it all.

WHY IS SRK HANDSOME?
